session.assistant:
Perfect! All four changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of the updates made to `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py`:
## Summary of Changes
I've successfully updated all four user-facing output strings in the file to change "plan" to "PR" where it refers to an erk-plan:
1. **Line 146**: Changed `"Plan '{identifier}' not found"` to `"PR '{identifier}' not found"` - Error message when a PR is not found
2. **Line 356**: Changed `"No events found for plan #{plan_number}"` to `"No events found for PR #{plan_number}"` - Message when no events are found for a PR
3. **Line 359**: Changed `"Plan #{plan_number} Event Timeline\n"` to `"PR #{plan_number} Event Timeline\n"` - Header for the event timeline output
4. **Line 403**: Changed `"Plan created: worktree '{worktree}' assigned"` to `"PR created: worktree '{worktree}' assigned"` - Event description for PR creation
All internal names remain unchanged - only the user-facing output strings were modified. Variable names (like `plan_number`), function names, class names, and internal comments were preserved as instructed.
